===============================================================================
Escape Heat
AI-Powered Urban Heat Decision Intelligence Platform
===============================================================================

1. PROJECT OVERVIEW
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Escape Heat is an AI-powered Decision Intelligence Platform that helps citizens,
organizations, and city authorities understand urban heat conditions and make
safer daily decisions using real-time environmental data and Generative AI.

Unlike traditional weather applications, Escape Heat analyzes current
environmental conditions and provides personalized, actionable recommendations
instead of predicting future weather.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

2. PROBLEM STATEMENT
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Current weather applications only display environmental metrics such as
temperature and humidity. They do not explain:

• Personal heat risk
• Health impact
• Recommended actions
• Community heat exposure
• Urban intervention priorities

Although environmental data is publicly available, it is fragmented and difficult
for ordinary users to understand and act upon.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

3. SOLUTION
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Escape Heat combines weather, environmental, and geospatial data into a central
Heat Intelligence Engine that calculates heat-related risk and generates
AI-powered recommendations.

Decision Pipeline

Collect Data
    ↓
Analyze Conditions
    ↓
Calculate Risk
    ↓
Generate Insights
    ↓
Recommend Actions

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

4. TARGET USERS
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

• Citizens
• Outdoor Workers
• Elderly People
• Vulnerable Individuals
• Organizations
• Municipal Authorities

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

5. TECHNOLOGY STACK
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Frontend
- Next.js
- React

UI
- Tailwind CSS

Backend
- FastAPI

Database
- Supabase PostgreSQL

Authentication
- Supabase Auth

Storage
- Supabase Storage

Artificial Intelligence
- Gemini API (Google AI Studio)

AI Agent Framework
- Google ADK (Agent Development Kit)

Maps
- Leaflet
- OpenStreetMap

Charts
- Chart.js

Deployment
- Vercel
- Render

Version Control
- GitHub

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

6. DATA SOURCES
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Weather
- Open-Meteo API
- NASA POWER
- IMD Open Datasets (Optional)

Satellite
- ISRO Datasets
- Land Surface Temperature Datasets

Environmental
- OpenStreetMap
- Tree Cover Datasets
- Land Use / Land Cover Datasets

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

7. SYSTEM ARCHITECTURE
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

User
 │
 ▼
Location + User Profile
 │
 ├── Weather APIs
 ├── Satellite Data
 └── Environmental Data
          │
          ▼
     FastAPI Backend
          │
          ▼
 Heat Intelligence Engine
          │
          ▼
    Gemini AI + ADK
          │
          ▼
Dashboard & Recommendations

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

8. MVP FEATURES
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

8.1 Heat Dashboard

Displays

- Current Location
- Heat Risk
- Temperature
- Feels Like Temperature
- Humidity
- UV Index
- Wind Speed
- Air Quality
- Daily Risk Summary

--------------------------------------------------

8.2 Interactive Heat Map

Displays

- Current Location
- Heat Zones
- Parks
- Hospitals
- Cooling Centers (Demo Dataset)
- Water Stations (Demo Dataset)

--------------------------------------------------

8.3 Escape AI Assistant

Purpose

Answer natural language questions using environmental context.

Example

"Is it safe to go jogging?"

Context Used

- Weather
- User Profile
- Environmental Data
- Heat Risk Score

--------------------------------------------------

8.4 Recommendation Engine

Provides

- Hydration Advice
- Outdoor Activity Guidance
- Clothing Suggestions
- Safe Time Recommendations
- Travel Advice
- Health Precautions

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

9. MVP WORKFLOW
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Weather APIs
Satellite Data
Environmental Data
User Location
User Profile
        │
        ▼
   FastAPI Backend
        │
        ▼
Heat Intelligence Engine
        │
        ▼
 Gemini AI + ADK
        │
        ▼
Dashboard + Recommendations

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

10. PROJECT DELIVERABLES
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- Responsive Web Application
- Heat Dashboard
- Interactive Heat Map
- Escape AI Assistant
- Recommendation Engine
- Backend APIs
- Supabase Database
- Production Deployment

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

11. PROJECT PRINCIPLES
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- Analyze current environmental conditions.
- Do not predict future weather.
- AI explains insights using structured environmental data.
- Risk scores are calculated by the Heat Intelligence Engine.
- Recommendations must be personalized, explainable, and actionable.
- Use real public datasets whenever possible.
- Design every module to be independent, reusable, and API-driven.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

12. DEVELOPMENT GOAL
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Build a production-ready MVP capable of helping users make safer decisions
during extreme heat conditions by combining environmental intelligence,
deterministic risk analysis, and Generative AI.
